surfaces.summary: Exports action runtime APIs for client use plus ActionRuntimeCoreClientProvider.

Exports server auth access, RBAC, and Fastify auth policy providers plus server auth utility modules.

Exports server-side Supabase auth service and action contributor helpers.
Exports no runtime API today (reserved client entrypoint).

Configure Supabase project URL for auth.

Configure application public URL for auth redirect flows.

descriptor.description: Auth web module: Fastify auth routes plus web login/sign-out scaffolds.

Exports auth web server providers, controller/service classes, route builders, and HTTP schema modules.
Exports client route registration helper for auth surfaces.

routes.summary: Log in with configured credentials
Request one-time email login code
Verify one-time email login code and create session
Log out and clear session cookies
Start OAuth login with configured provider
Complete OAuth code exchange and set session cookies
Request a password reset email
Complete password recovery link exchange
Set a new password for authenticated recovery session
Register a new user
Get current session status and CSRF token

routes.name: auth-login
routes.purpose: Public login route for authentication flows.

routes.name: auth-signout
routes.purpose: Public sign-out route that clears session then returns to login.

routes.name: auth-default-login-2
routes.purpose: Auto-registered default login route from descriptor metadata.

files.reason: Install minimal login container that renders the module-provided DefaultLoginView by default.
Install minimal sign-out container that renders the module-provided SignOutView by default (edit the scaffolded file to customize).
Provide a global /auth/login wrapper that renders the package login view.
Provide a global /auth/signout wrapper that renders the package sign-out view.
